properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the eye of the storm, You remain in control In the middle of the war, You guard my soul You alone are the anchor, when my sails are torn Your love surrounds, me in the eye of the storm

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the solid ground is falling out From underneath my feet Between the black skies and my red eyes I can barely see When I realize I've been let down by my friends and my family I can hear the rain reminding me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When my hopes and dreams are far from me And I'm running out of faith I see the future I pictured slowly fade away And when the tears of pain and heartache are pouring down my face I find my peace in Jesus' name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When they let me go and I just don't know How I'm gonna make ends meet I did my best Now I'm scared to death That we might lose everything

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when a sickness takes my child away And there's nothing I can do My only hope is to trust You I trust You LORD
